gifts.name: MVP Core
gifts.tagline: A real two-day festival — Sat–Sun 11 AM–5 PM, lions, carnival, and ~37 vendors.
gifts.description: Full-weekend ops baseline (~$40K) funded by vendor booth fees, parking, carnival share, and sponsor/grant gap. Includes 2 lion dances, 2 stages, and carnival midway (operator profit share — zero ops cost to cPALSs). Parade, elder hospitality, Saturday night, and paid talent are registry upgrades.
benefits: Baseline experience every guest sees — not a sponsor toggle

gifts.name: Parade Performers
gifts.tagline: Marching band, second line, and hired parade units — a parade worth watching.
gifts.description: Paid parade performers and hired units. Without this block, there is no parade at MVP.

gifts.name: Decor + Parade Production
gifts.tagline: Lanterns, stage flowers, and parade production polish — visual Tết atmosphere.
gifts.description: Decor registry block covering lanterns, stage flowers, and parade production elements families photograph.
benefits: Logo on decor assets photographed for social

gifts.name: Digital Marketing
gifts.tagline: Paid Meta / Instagram and boosted posts — reach families who have not found us yet.
gifts.description: Paid digital marketing — media sponsorship, not a petty-cash ask. No print posters.

gifts.name: Honor our Elders
gifts.tagline: Shade tents, seating, and elder tea hospitality — a place for grandparents to rest.
gifts.description: Named elder hospitality zone with shade, seating, and tea service. Not in MVP ops — grass fallback without sponsor.

gifts.name: Cây nêu (Tết Pole)
gifts.tagline: Traditional centerpiece — the pole families gather around at Tết.
gifts.description: Traditional Tết pole centerpiece. 2027 community pool pilot — materials, decor labor, and volunteer hospitality.
benefits: Named on Google Sites + Instagram unlock post

gifts.name: Saturday Night Headliner
gifts.tagline: Sat 5–8 PM — evening ops, AV, headliner, and MC. A night concert that holds a crowd.
gifts.description: Saturday night extension with evening ops, lights/AV, headliner, and MC — not ops-only empty hours.

gifts.name: Paris By Night Style Revue
gifts.tagline: ~2-hour produced variety show — singers, comedy, cultural numbers, MC.
gifts.description: Signature produced revue block — can stand alone or pair with Weekend Programming.

gifts.name: Weekend Programming
gifts.tagline: Full Sat–Sun talent slate — MC, singers, bands, dance beyond lions.
gifts.description: Presenting programming sponsor block — full talent slate unlock for the weekend.

gifts.name: Lucky Wav Edition
gifts.tagline: Younger-skewed stage block — DJs, R&B, rap, dance.
gifts.description: Named Lucky Wav segment — sub-block of programming with social-first unlock content.

gifts.name: Stage Production / AV
gifts.tagline: Upgraded outdoor sound, lights, and LED — main stage concert quality.
gifts.description: Outdoor AV upgrade — engineer, lights, LED for main stage production quality.

gifts.name: Community anchor / gap
gifts.tagline: Close the MVP cash gap or stack toward recognition tiers.
gifts.description: Flexible community or business anchor gift — $1,500–$15,000 scales with tier benefits in Section B. Does not fund a named registry feature.
benefits: Name + logo on programs and web at Community tier

gifts.name: Carnival Zone Naming
gifts.tagline: Optional — logo at midway. Not required to run rides.
gifts.description: Named carnival zone recognition. Midway is operator-funded at MVP — this is optional branding only.

gifts.name: Sponsor booth spot
gifts.tagline: 10×10 tent + table + chairs — on-site activation beyond logo.
gifts.description: Sponsor booth slot at the festival. Includes tent, table, and 2 chairs. Path to grow booth count beyond spending-derived paid mix.

gifts.name: Sunday Festival Day
gifts.tagline: Second festival day — Sat-only scenario only.
gifts.description: Sun 11 AM–5 PM: second-day ops — security, sanitation, PA, KP indoor stage, 2nd lion dance. Full-weekend planning baseline already includes Sunday; this block applies only if steering chooses Sat-only and a sponsor funds day 2.

gifts.name: Pageant / Influencer
gifts.tagline: Off-year 2027 — pageant segments and influencer activations if brought back.
gifts.description: Pageant and influencer activation block. Only if steering revives pageant programming in 2027.
